theme: One multiplier ladder for many exponents
title: One Ladder, Many Exponents: A Shared Addition Sequence
strategies: one shared doubling ladder + per-target set-bit sums (greedy)
meet-in-the-middle split: assemble the shared low chunk once, reuse it (strong)
Yao windowing + shared common high-window sub-sums below strong (open ceiling, uncovered)
